results.changes: Reduced skill from 435 lines (PostgreSQL/MySQL/SQLite) to ~100 lines SQLite-only. Added CSV import patterns, normalization examples, and JSON output patterns.

Rewrote skill to be Python-first. Removed all sqlite3 CLI examples (model got stuck in infinite loop on dot commands). Added complete copy-pasteable Python scripts for both CSV-to-DB import and normalization workflows. Emphasized DISTINCT/dict-tracking to avoid duplicate rows. Added explicit type casting (int/float) for CSV values.

key_insights: devstral-small cannot reliably use sqlite3 CLI dot commands (.mode, .import) via shell - it gets stuck in loops
Python sqlite3 module is 100% reliable and avoids all shell escaping issues
Providing complete, task-aligned example scripts lets the model follow the pattern directly
Explicit DISTINCT/dedup logic is critical for normalization tasks
